props.label: CretaceousFallenLog_BiomeB
props.narrative_note: Fallen ancient conifer. Moss and ferns colonising the bark. Suggests old-growth forest undisturbed for centuries.

props.label: CretaceousBoulder_BiomeB_1
props.narrative_note: Weathered granite outcrop. Lichen-covered. Shelter potential for small fauna.

props.label: CretaceousBoulder_BiomeB_2
props.narrative_note: Larger boulder formation. Claw marks possible on surface — dinosaur territory marker.

props.label: CretaceousBoulder_BiomeB_3
props.narrative_note: Dominant rock in cluster. Elevated vantage point. Player can climb for scouting.
